subject: Tranquill — a dove/pigeon-like bird Pokemon with a reddish head marking, perched on rocky ground
description: A medium-sized bird creature with a plump pigeon-like body stands on rocky or rubble-strewn ground. A reddish-pink coloring is visible on its head or neck region, contrasting with the grey and cream tones of its body plumage. Wings are held at rest against its body. The background is muted grey-green, suggesting an overcast outdoor setting with some low vegetation or foliage. The bird faces forward with a calm, composed posture.
foreground: pigeon-like bird creature perched on rocky ground with reddish head marking
background: muted grey-green outdoor background with low vegetation
emotion: calm, composed — upright posture, neutral expression
